session.user: Load and follow the skill instructions in .claude/skills/pr-feedback-classifier/SKILL.md Arguments: --pr 8799 Return the complete JSON output as your final message.
session.assistant: I'll load the skill and execute it with the provided arguments.
session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→name: pr-feedback-classifier 3→description: > 4→ Fetches and classifies PR review feedback with context isolation. 5→ Returns structured JSON with thread IDs for deterministic resolution. 6→ Use when analyzing PR comments before addressing them. 7→argument-hint: "[--pr <number>] [--include-resolved]" 8→context: fork 9→agent: general-purpose 10→model: sonnet 11→--- 12→ 13→# PR Feedback Classifier 14→ 15→Fetch and classify all PR review feedback for the current branch's PR. 16→ 17→## Arguments 18→ 19→- `--pr <number>`: Target a specific PR by number (default: current branch's PR) 20→- `--include-resolved`: Include resolved threads (for reference) 21→ 22→Check `$ARGUMENTS` for flags. 23→ 24→## Critical Constraints 25→ 26→**DO NOT write Python scripts or any code files.** Classify the data using direct AI reasoning only. Writing code to process JSON is unnecessary and pollutes the filesystem. 27→ 28→## Steps 29→ 30→1. **Fetch PR info and all comments in a single call:**
... [194 lines omitted] ...
130→ "action_summary": "Bot suggestion: add unit tests for error handling paths", 132→ "original_comment": "Consider adding unit tests for the error handling paths in this endpoint" 170→ "error": null 184→## Error Case 198→ "error": "No PR found for branch feature-xyz" 216→ "error": null
session.assistant: Now I'll fetch the PR feedback using the specified PR number 8799:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: git diff --stat -M -C main...HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "No main branch or not on a feature branch"

**Branch:** `plnd/consolidate-learn-docs-03-06-0120`", "url": "https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8799#issuecomment-4008890030" }, { "id": 4008939162, "author": "github-actions[bot]", "body": "<!-- audit-pr-docs -->

## ❌ Audit PR Docs

**Last updated:** 2026-03-06 20:35:23 PT

Found 2 violations across 2 files. Inline comments posted for each.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ VERBATIM code blocks — 1 found in docs/learned/cli/rich-table-output.md:44
❌ INACCURATE claims — Found in docs/learned/planning/incremental-dispatch.md:34
✅ DUPLICATIVE sections — None found
✅ DRIFT RISK sections — None found

### Violations Summary
- `docs/learned/planning/incremental-dispatch.md:34`: Inaccurate source pointer — references step named "check-existing-impl-context" which doesn't exist; actual step is "Checkout implementation branch"
- `docs/learned/cli/rich-table-output.md:44`: Verbatim erk source code in code block — uses erk-specific types (`plan.url`, `plan.plan_identifier`) from `list_cmd.py:188`

### Verdicts
| File | Verdict | Duplicative % | High Value % | Issues |
|------|---------|---------------|-------------|--------|
| `docs/learned/architecture/checked-out-branch-handling.md` | KEEP | 0% | 90% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/cli/command-promotion.md` | KEEP | 0% | 100% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/cli/pr-submit-pipeline.md` | KEEP | 0% | 100% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/cli/rich-table-output.md` | KEEP | 5% | 90% | 1 verbatim block |
| `docs/learned/planning/incremental-dispatch.md` | KEEP | 0% | 90% | 1 inaccurate step name |
| `docs/learned/refactoring/coordinated-rename.md` | KEEP | 0% | 100% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/textual/quirks.md` | KEEP | 0% | 100% | 0 (new section clean) |
| `docs/learned/tui/filter-toggle-pattern.md` | KEEP | 0% | 100% | 0 |

### Files Reviewed
- `docs/learned/architecture/checked-out-branch-handling.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/cli/command-promotion.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/cli/pr-submit-pipeline.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/cli/rich-table-output.md`: 1 violation
- `docs/learned/planning/incremental-dispatch.md`: 1 violation
- `docs/learned/refactoring/coordinated-rename.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/textual/quirks.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/tui/filter-toggle-pattern.md`: 0 violations

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-03-06 20:35:23 PT**: Found 2 violations: inaccurate step name in incremental-dispatch.md:34 ("check-existing-impl-context" doesn't exist — actual step is "Checkout implementation branch"), verbatim erk source in rich-table-output.md:44 (link f-string uses erk types plan.url/plan.plan_identifier)
- **2026-03-06 16:51:37 PT**: Found 2 violations: inaccurate source path in checked-out-branch-handling.md:22 (src/erk/gateway/git/worktree.py doesn't exist, should be packages/erk-shared/...), drift risk in pr-submit-pipeline.md:50 (line numbers in source pointer)
- **2026-03-05 17:37:19 PT**: Found 13 verbatim violations across 5 files: checked-out-branch-handling.md (3), command-promotion.md (2), rich-table-output.md (1), textual/quirks.md (1), filter-toggle-pattern.md (6)

session.assistant: Now I'll analyze the PR feedback and classify it according to the skill requirements:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: git diff --stat -M -C plnd/consolidate-learn-docs-03-06-0120...main 2>/dev/null || git diff --stat -M -C HEAD~5...HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "Unable to get diff stats"
